metadata.title: Girls on Film (Night Version)
metadata.lyrics:
[01:31.26] See them walking hand in hand across the bridge at midnight
[01:38.75] Heads turning as the lights flashing out are so bright
[01:45.25] And walk right out to the four line track
[01:47.00] There's a camera rolling on her back
[01:50.16] On her back
[01:52.10] And I sense a rhythm humming in a frenzy all the way down her spine
[01:56.02] 
[01:58.12] 
[02:01.49] Girls on film
[02:04.96] Girls on film
[02:08.58] Girls on film
[02:12.07] Girls on film
[02:15.51] 
[02:23.63] Lipstick cherry all over the lens as she's falling
[02:31.02] And miles of sharp blue water coming in where she lies
[02:37.77] The diving man's coming up for air
[02:39.47] 'Cause the crowd all love pulling Dolly by the hair
[02:42.54] By the hair
[02:44.56] And she wonders how she ever got here as she goes under again
[02:50.64] 
[02:53.91] Girls on film (two minutes later)
[02:57.46] Girls on film
[03:00.98] Girls on film (got your picture)
[03:04.56] Girls on film
[04:14.69] 
[04:17.95] Take one last glimpse into the night
[04:22.23] I'm touching close
[04:23.35] I'm holding bright, holding tight
[04:25.80] Shudders in a whisper
[04:29.49] Take me high up 'til I'm shooting a star
[04:34.58] 
[04:38.74] Shooting a star
[04:41.58] 
[04:45.89] Shooting a star
[04:48.97] 
[04:52.83] I'm shooting a star
[04:54.00]
